description: Return a list of all Timecard Entries within a specified date range.

parameters.name: start_date
parameters.description: The beginning of the date range for entries. (YYYY-MM-DD); if not provided, this will default to 1 week ago

parameters.name: end_date
parameters.description: The end of the date range for entries. (YYYY-MM-DD); if not provided, this will default to today
